name: White Chocolate Chip Cookie with Macadamia Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. BLEND BUTTER, SUGARS, EGG, AND VANILLA UNTIL FLUFFY. STOP TO SCRAPE DOWN THE SIDES OF THE BOWL.
2. ADD FLOUR, BAKING SODA, AND SALT; MIX UNTIL JUST COMBINED. DO NOT OVER MIX.
3. STIR IN WHITE CHOCOLATE CHUNKS AND NUTS.
4. MOUND DOUGH BY 1/3 CUPFULS ONTO A LIGHTLY GREASED COOKIE SHEET, SPACING ABOUT 2 INCHES APART.
5. BAKE IN A PREHEATED 375 DEGREE OVEN UNTIL LIGHTLY BROWNED AROUND THE EDGES, ABOUT 15 MINUTES.
6. COOL ON THE COOKIE SHEET FOR 3 MINUTES, THEN REMOVE TO RACKS AND ALLOW TO COOL COMPLETELY.
7. STORE IN AN AIR-TIGHT CONTAINER. (CAN BE PREPARED AHEAD OF TIME. STORE COOKIES UNTIL 4 DAYS AT ROOM TEMPERATURE OR FROZE FOR 3 WEEKS.)
